DB.description: D1 database — routes, probes, stats, config. Schema auto-migrates on first request.

POSTER_CACHE.description: R2 bucket — persistent cache for Emby posters/images (bounded to the free tier).

scripts.build: node scripts/build-assets.mjs && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --minify --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=worker.js --legal-comments=inline --banner:js="// AUTO-GENERATED from src/ — do not edit directly. Run 'npm run build'."
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run obfuscate && wrangler deploy --no-bundle
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npm run obfuscate && wrangler deploy --no-bundle -c wrangler.prod.toml
scripts.deploy:plain: npm run build && wrangler deploy --main worker.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run snapshot:check && npm test
